resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def isPowerOfFour(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n > 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0 and (n & 0xAAAAAAAA) == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses bit manipulation to check three conditions in one line: positive, single-bit set (power of two), and that bit is in an even position (power of four).
